articles.title: Data shows Bitcoin and altcoins at risk of a 20% drop to new yearly lows
articles.description: The total crypto market capitalization dropped to the $1 trillion support, and weak stablecoin demand and a largely absent funding rate reflect traders’ negative sentiment.

articles.title: Cardano (ADA) Reclaims Strong Buy Territory – Here’s How
articles.description: Cardano (ADA) was enjoying the uptrend last month. Following the price rally that insinuated a rise in the entire crypto market, crypto prices have nosedived again in the past week. ADA prices reaches buy zone Cardano lost 18% the past week ADA price drops 2.88% as of press time After the formation of that uptrend that drove the entire cryptocurrency market higher, prices crashed heavily in...
